quotes.text: Fear not death—it whispers glory to those who dare.
quotes.author: Ragnar Lodbrok

quotes.text: A kingdom is not built on blood, but on the unity of its people.
quotes.author: Salah al-Din

quotes.text: A hammer strikes hardest when the enemy is near.
quotes.author: Charles Martel

quotes.text: Victory is forged long before the battle begins.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.text: With faith in my heart, no blade can break me.
quotes.author: Joan of Arc

quotes.text: There are no more worlds to conquer—only new kingdoms to raise.
quotes.author: Alexander the Great

quotes.text: A queen bows to no empire.
quotes.author: Boudica

quotes.text: I came, I saw, I conquered.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: Every Governor dreams of actually having me as their city garrison.
quotes.author: City Keeper

quotes.text: The greatest joy is to conquer and hear the cries of their warriors.
quotes.author: Genghis Khan

quotes.text: Join our discord to see what the community is saying about this war. Who will win?
quotes.author: Prokingdoms

kvkDetailsData.name: H ム I D E R
H ム I D E R

evolutionChapters.title: First Steps
evolutionChapters.description: A total of 20 alliance fortresses were built between all alliances in the Lost Kingdom.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Stepping onto the battlefield, the trumpets of war continue to echo faintly.

rawMilestone.title: First Steps
rawMilestone.goalText: A total of {p1} alliance fortresses were built between all alliances in the Lost Kingdom.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all crusader camps throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin a crusader camp to attack it.
rawMilestone.description: Stepping onto the battlefield, the trumpets of war continue to echo faintly.

evolutionChapters.title: Eye for an Eye
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 2 crusader camps at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: That which was lost will soon be reclaimed...

rawMilestone.title: Eye for an Eye
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} crusader camps at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all crusader fortresses throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin a crusader fortress to attack it.
rawMilestone.description: That which was lost will soon be reclaimed...

evolutionChapters.title: Turf Wars
evolutionChapters.description: Your camp controlled its own Crusader Fortress at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The Lost Kingdom shall be ours once more!

rawMilestone.title: Turf Wars
rawMilestone.goalText: Your camp controlled its own Crusader Fortress at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.description: The Lost Kingdom shall be ours once more!

evolutionChapters.title: Hand in Hand
evolutionChapters.description: Complete at least 10 quests assigned by epic commanders.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: We need not face our fates alone; Heroes stand together.

rawMilestone.title: Hand in Hand
rawMilestone.goalText: Complete at least {p1} quests assigned by epic commanders.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all ancient ruins throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory does not need to adjoin a set of ancient ruins to attack it. Expel all barbarians and troops that do not belong to your coalition from the area, and your coalition will automatically take control of the ruins.
rawMilestone.description: We need not face our fates alone; Heroes stand together.

evolutionChapters.title: Retribution
evolutionChapters.description: Your troops defeated 3 ruins stalkers.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Crime and punishment are exhibited here. We represent justice.

rawMilestone.title: Retribution
rawMilestone.goalText: Your troops defeated {p1} ruins stalkers.
rawMilestone.description: Crime and punishment are exhibited here. We represent justice.

evolutionChapters.title: Revenge
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition destroyed 100 Lvl 11+ barbarian forts.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: This land belongs to us now...

rawMilestone.title: Revenge
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition destroyed {p1} Lvl 11+ barbarian forts.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all level 4 passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will become semi-protected. Semi-protected passes can only be attacked by coalitions from the controlling camp. Governors from other camps cannot attack semi-protected passes, nor can they pass through to enter outer provinces corresponding to the controlling camp.
rawMilestone.description: This land belongs to us now...

evolutionChapters.title: Storm Clouds
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 4 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Onward! We fight for our forefathers!

rawMilestone.title: Storm Clouds
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 4 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: After the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all coalitions in the Lost Kingdom will be able to recruit one more new alliance from their camp.
rawMilestone.description: Onward! We fight for our forefathers!

evolutionChapters.title: Wolves & Lambs
evolutionChapters.description: Killed or severely wounded 1000000 units of other camps.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Deeper, lurking battles have begun.

rawMilestone.title: Wolves & Lambs
rawMilestone.goalText: Killed or severely wounded {p1} units of other camps.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all hierons throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin a hieron to attack it.
rawMilestone.description: Deeper, lurking battles have begun.

evolutionChapters.title: Seeking Sanctuary
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 2 hierons at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Capturing Sanctuaries will grant us places of respite and protection, and put us one step closer to our final goal.

rawMilestone.title: Seeking Sanctuary
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} hierons at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all level 5 passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will become semi-protected. Semi-protected passes can only be attacked by coalitions from the controlling camp. Governors from other camps cannot attack semi-protected passes, nor can they pass through to enter outer provinces corresponding to the controlling camp.
rawMilestone.description: Capturing Sanctuaries will grant us places of respite and protection, and put us one step closer to our final goal.

evolutionChapters.title: Pushing Forward
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 5 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Arrows cut swiftly through the blood-stained air...

rawMilestone.title: Pushing Forward
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 5 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all sanctuaries throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin a sanctuary to attack it.
rawMilestone.description: Arrows cut swiftly through the blood-stained air...

evolutionChapters.title: Seize the Sanctuaries
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Sanctuary(s) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: A mysterious force holds sway over these lands...

rawMilestone.title: Seize the Sanctuaries
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Sanctuary(s) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all level 6 passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will become semi-protected. Semi-protected passes can only be attacked by coalitions from the controlling camp. Governors from other camps cannot attack semi-protected passes, nor can they pass through to enter outer provinces corresponding to the controlling camp.
rawMilestone.description: A mysterious force holds sway over these lands...

evolutionChapters.title: Access Granted
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 6 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The Great Ziggurat and our final challenge lie ahead...

rawMilestone.title: Access Granted
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 6 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all altars of darkness throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory does not need to adjoin an altar of darkness to attack it. Expel all barbarians and troops that do not belong to your coalition from the area, and your coalition will automatically take control of the altar.
rawMilestone.description: The Great Ziggurat and our final challenge lie ahead...

evolutionChapters.title: Sacrificial Offering
evolutionChapters.description: Your troops defeated 3 dark stalkers.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The mysterious power of the ruins drives us onward...

rawMilestone.title: Sacrificial Offering
rawMilestone.goalText: Your troops defeated {p1} dark stalkers.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), Level 12 barbarian forts will be activated in the Lost Kingdom. They are garrisoned by 2,100,000 Tier 5 units and can only be attacked by rallied armies.
rawMilestone.description: The mysterious power of the ruins drives us onward...

evolutionChapters.title: Strife and Conflict
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition destroyed 100 Lvl 12+ barbarian forts.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: War has come once more to the Lost Kingdom...

rawMilestone.title: Strife and Conflict
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition destroyed {p1} Lvl 12+ barbarian forts.
rawMilestone.description: War has come once more to the Lost Kingdom...

evolutionChapters.title: Hall of Unity
evolutionChapters.description: Complete at least 10 quests assigned by legendary commanders.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Trust and an unbreakable bond allow us to move forward.

rawMilestone.title: Hall of Unity
rawMilestone.goalText: Complete at least {p1} quests assigned by legendary commanders.
rawMilestone.description: Trust and an unbreakable bond allow us to move forward.

evolutionChapters.title: Siege the Land
evolutionChapters.description: A total of 200 Crusader Flags were built between all coalitions in the Lost Kingdom.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Civilization's progress stands on the broken bones of our ancestors...

rawMilestone.title: Siege the Land
rawMilestone.goalText: A total of {p1} Crusader Flags were built between all coalitions in the Lost Kingdom.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all Level 7 Passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will enter a countdown, and will become semi-protected {p1} hours later. Semi-protected Passes can only be attacked by Coalitions from the controlling Camp. Governors from other Camps cannot attack semi-protected Passes, nor can they pass through to enter outer Provinces corresponding to the controlling Camp.
rawMilestone.description: Civilization's progress stands on the broken bones of our ancestors...

evolutionChapters.title: Arrows Nocked
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 7 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: We know one thing: this fight is unavoidable.

rawMilestone.title: Arrows Nocked
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 7 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.description: We know one thing: this fight is unavoidable.

evolutionChapters.title: Stormy Seas
evolutionChapters.description: Killed or severely wounded 2000000 units of other camps.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The clash of steel on steel rings out endlessly, and the land itself trembles at our battle cry.

rawMilestone.title: Stormy Seas
rawMilestone.goalText: Killed or severely wounded {p1} units of other camps.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), Level 13 barbarian forts will be activated in the Lost Kingdom. They are garrisoned by 2,200,000 Tier 5 units and can only be attacked by rallied armies.
rawMilestone.description: The clash of steel on steel rings out endlessly, and the land itself trembles at our battle cry.

evolutionChapters.title: Drums of War
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition destroyed 100 Lvl 13+ barbarian forts.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Bloodthirsty soldiers march to one final warsong...

rawMilestone.title: Drums of War
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition destroyed {p1} Lvl 13+ barbarian forts.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all circles throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin a circle to attack it.
rawMilestone.description: Bloodthirsty soldiers march to one final warsong...

evolutionChapters.title: Indomitable Contender
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 circles at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Battle-weary warriors rest their swords and catch their breath...

rawMilestone.title: Indomitable Contender
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} circles at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), Level 14 barbarian forts will be activated in the Lost Kingdom. They are garrisoned by 2,300,000 Tier 5 units and can only be attacked by rallied armies.
rawMilestone.description: Battle-weary warriors rest their swords and catch their breath...

evolutionChapters.title: Brink of Annihilation
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition destroyed 100 Lvl 14+ barbarian forts.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Only the strongest can survive the trials of the Lost Kingdom!

rawMilestone.title: Brink of Annihilation
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition destroyed {p1} Lvl 14+ barbarian forts.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all level 8 passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will be activated, and {p1} hours later will become unsealed. Unsealed passes can be attacked by coalitions from any camp, and coalitions who successfully occupy a pass will be able to travel into the corresponding province. (However, coalition territory must still adjoin the pass before an attack can be launched.)
rawMilestone.description: Only the strongest can survive the trials of the Lost Kingdom!

evolutionChapters.title: Clarity in Hindsight
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 8 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: Deeper, lurking battles have begun.

rawMilestone.title: Clarity in Hindsight
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 8 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), all Level 9 and Level 7 Passes throughout the Lost Kingdom will enter a countdown, and will become unsealed {p1} hours later. Unsealed Passes can be attacked by Coalitions from any Camp, and Coalitions who successfully occupy a Pass will be able to travel into the corresponding Province. (However, Coalition territory must still adjoin the Pass before an attack can be launched.)
rawMilestone.description: Deeper, lurking battles have begun.

evolutionChapters.title: The Final Door
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 1 Lvl 9 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: We are about to open the door to the end.

rawMilestone.title: The Final Door
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Lvl 9 Pass(es) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.description: We are about to open the door to the end.

evolutionChapters.title: Face-Off
evolutionChapters.description: Killed or severely wounded 3000000 units of other camps.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: New Passes have opened, sending our forces in multiple directions. Onwards! We have Holy Sites to liberate.

rawMilestone.title: Face-Off
rawMilestone.goalText: Killed or severely wounded {p1} units of other camps.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), the Lost Kingdom's Great Ziggurat will be activated, and {p1} hours later will be open for contending. Your coalition territory must adjoin the Great Ziggurat to attack it.
rawMilestone.extraFunctionDesc: Battle of the Peaks Bundle available
rawMilestone.description: New Passes have opened, sending our forces in multiple directions. Onwards! We have Holy Sites to liberate.

evolutionChapters.title: Holy Site Heroes
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled The Great Ziggurat at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The name of the victor shall forever ring out across this battlefield, never to be forgotten by their opponent.

rawMilestone.title: Holy Site Heroes
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled The Great Ziggurat at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionDesc: At the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), Level 15 barbarian forts will be activated in the Lost Kingdom. They are garrisoned by 2,500,000 Tier 5 units and can only be attacked by rallied armies.
rawMilestone.description: The name of the victor shall forever ring out across this battlefield, never to be forgotten by their opponent.

evolutionChapters.title: Unending Victory
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition destroyed 100 Lvl 15+ barbarian forts.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: To stand victorious: this is everyone's hope.

rawMilestone.title: Unending Victory
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition destroyed {p1} Lvl 15+ barbarian forts.
rawMilestone.description: To stand victorious: this is everyone's hope.

evolutionChapters.title: The Way Ahead
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 4 Sanctuary(s) at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: The final battle has begun.

rawMilestone.title: The Way Ahead
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} Sanctuary(s) at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.description: The final battle has begun.

evolutionChapters.title: Ebullient
evolutionChapters.description: Your coalition controlled 4 hierons at the end of the chapter.
evolutionChapters.flavorText: We will fight tooth and nail for the Holy Sites. The smoke may clear, but the glory we win will never fade.

rawMilestone.title: Ebullient
rawMilestone.goalText: Your coalition controlled {p1} hierons at the end of the chapter.
rawMilestone.functionTitle: Every End Is A New Beginning
rawMilestone.functionDesc: The Lost Kingdom will be closed some time after the end of this chapter (whether or not the objective is achieved), and all governors will be transported back to their home kingdoms. The next time the Lost Kingdom opens, your kingdom will face a new set of opponents!
rawMilestone.description: We will fight tooth and nail for the Holy Sites. The smoke may clear, but the glory we win will never fade.
